title: Extension Popup State Loading
interaction_flow: PopupScript → PopupScript: loadState() [called on script load, line 67]
PopupScript → chrome.tabs API: chrome.tabs.query({ active: true, currentWindow: true })
chrome.tabs API → PopupScript: returns [tab] → tabId = tab?.id
PopupScript: if (!tabId) return [guard: no active tab]
PopupScript → chrome.runtime (ServiceWorker): sendMessage({ action: 'get-state', tabId }, callback: updateFromState)
chrome.runtime (ServiceWorker) → PopupScript: response state = { findings: [...], overlaysVisible: bool }
PopupScript: if (!state) return [guard: null state = idle/no scan yet]
PopupScript → DOM: countNumber.textContent = String(count) [count = findings.reduce sum or 0]
PopupScript → DOM: btnToggle.textContent = overlaysVisible ? 'Hide overlays' : 'Show overlays'
real_time_update_flow: PopupScript → DOM: countNumber.textContent, classList, countLabel updated from msg.findings
PopupScript → DOM: btnScan.textContent = 'Scan page', btnScan.disabled = false
chrome.runtime (ServiceWorker) → PopupScript: onMessage({ action: 'overlays-toggled-broadcast', visible: bool })

key_methods.loadState: async () — queries active tab, sends 'get-state' message to service worker, passes updateFromState as callback
key_methods.getActiveTabId: async () → tabId | undefined — wraps chrome.tabs.query for active tab in current window
key_methods.updateFromState: (state) → void — renders findings count and overlay toggle state onto DOM; no-ops if state is falsy (idle)

state_shape.findings: Array<{ findings: Array<any> }> — nested; count = findings.reduce((sum, f) => sum + f.findings.length, 0)
state_shape.overlaysVisible: boolean, defaults to true if absent

dom_elements.countNumber: #count-number — displays numeric findings count, CSS class 'has-findings' toggled

conditions_and_branches: loadState: returns early if tabId is falsy (no active tab)
updateFromState: returns early if state is falsy (no persisted scan state → idle display)
count === 0 → countNumber has no 'has-findings' class, label = 'anti-patterns'
count > 0 → 'has-findings' class added, label singular/plural based on count === 1
state.overlaysVisible === false → btnToggle shows 'Show overlays', else 'Hide overlays'
important_notes: loadState() is invoked synchronously at script bottom (line 67) — runs as popup opens. No explicit DOMContentLoaded listener; relies on script-at-end pattern. Real-time updates handled by separate onMessage listener, not loadState. Service worker message protocol uses { action: string, tabId: number }.
